reviews.comment:
El servicio de despecho de NAFTA muy bien, la atención dentro del mercado pésima.
La señora q atendía, muy prepotente y con muy mala onda, compré unas cosas y me deje unos chicles en el mostrador. Salí al auto me di cuenta, entre y me dijo. No había dejado nada q seguro los había tirado afuera (cosa q no porque fueron 2 metros de distancia.

(Translated by Google)
The NAFTA dispatch service was very good, but the service inside the market was terrible.
The woman serving was very arrogant and rude. I bought some things and left some gum on the counter. I went out to my car and noticed, got in, and she told me. I hadn't left anything, I'd probably thrown it outside (which I hadn't, since I was 2 meters away).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtbWRueDFBRRAB
